overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit urban district. The player navigates through plazas, past food vendors, and along main streets with cyberpunk architecture featuring vibrant holographic advertisements and reflective wet pavement.

agents.ego_description: walking across a crosswalk into an open plaza area with neon-lit buildings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian crossing the crosswalk from right to left

entered.detail: futuristic yellow building with sharp angles and large digital billboard
small blue food cart with illuminated menu display
cyan phone booth with glowing red signage reading Love
red automated kiosk with illuminated front panel
concrete seating area with integrated planters

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a crosswalk in a rain-soaked urban plaza. The camera moves forward past a blue food cart and approaches concrete benches and phone booths. A pedestrian crosses in front of the camera as it advances toward the center of the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza with cherry blossom trees and food stalls

events.description: turning right toward area with pink-lit cherry blossom trees

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking toward a cyan-lit food stall and cherry tree area

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at cyan food stall serving customers

entered.detail: food stall with bright cyan neon lighting and customers gathered
trees with pink neon-lit blossoms reflecting on wet ground

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right toward a cyan-lit food stall, passing the phone booths. Pink cherry blossom trees illuminated with neon lights become visible in the distance, reflecting off the wet pavement. The vendor remains at the stall as the camera moves past.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor with purple neon lighting

events.description: entering narrow corridor with intense purple neon lighting

agents.ego_description: turning left into a narrow passage with purple neon lights and futuristic architecture

entered.detail: building facade with intense purple neon strip lighting and dark surfaces
covered walkway with purple illuminated pillars and overhead structure

segments.scene_description: Turning left away from the cherry trees, the camera enters a narrow corridor bathed in purple neon light. The environment becomes more enclosed with overhead coverings. The purple-lit walkway leads deeper into the urban complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: main street with traffic barriers and large billboards

events.description: exiting covered walkway onto main street with vehicle traffic
moving from purple neon to mixed street lighting with large digital billboard visible

agents.ego_description: walking along the main street sidewalk past traffic barriers and large advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with purple umbrella walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall digital billboard displaying advertisements on the building facade
orange and white striped traffic barriers lining the street edge

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens onto a main street with moving traffic. A large vertical billboard dominates the view ahead while orange traffic barriers line the street. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk along the sidewalk as vehicles pass by on the wet road.

scene_state.functional_zone: main street with continuous traffic and neon storefronts

events.description: vehicles passing by on the street with headlights reflecting on wet pavement

agents.ego_description: continuing along the main street sidewalk with moving traffic to the left

notable_agents.action: car driving down the street with headlights reflecting on the wet road surface

entered.detail: building with prominent cyan neon roof trim and glass facade

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the main street, passing by a building with distinctive cyan neon trim. Vehicles move steadily along the road to the left, their headlights creating reflections on the rain-soaked pavement. The traffic barriers recede into the distance as the walk continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked urban plaza that gradually narrows into a secluded, neon-lit corridor. It begins at a crosswalk, moving past a blue food cart and concrete benches as a pedestrian crosses the wet pavement. As the camera advances, it turns right toward a cyan-lit food stall, passing phone booths while neon-illuminated cherry blossom trees emerge in the distance. The scene then shifts as the camera turns away from the trees and enters a more enclosed environment. Finally, the open plaza gives way to a narrow walkway bathed in deep purple neon light, leading the viewer deeper into the urban complex under overhead coverings.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered walkway into the vibrant, rain-slicked expanse of a neon-lit city street. It begins by emerging from the cover of a walkway onto a main thoroughfare, where a towering vertical billboard dominates the skyline and orange traffic barriers line the road. As the camera advances, the view shifts past pedestrians with umbrellas and flowing traffic, with the wet pavement reflecting the surrounding city lights. The scene then opens further as the camera passes a building accented with sharp cyan neon trim, while the headlights of passing vehicles create shimmering streaks on the asphalt. Finally, the perspective pushes forward along the sidewalk, leaving the traffic barriers behind as the urban landscape stretches out ahead.
